_readme: Bundled release notes for the in-app 'What's new' card. Keyed by app version (must match package.json 'version'). RELEASE FLOW: when bumping the version (npm version X.Y.Z), add an entry here whose key is X.Y.Z and whose value is up to 5 short bullet strings taken from that release's notes. The app reads the entry for its own version; a version with no entry shows no card. This file is bundled via the build 'files' glob, so the notes ship inside the app — no network needed.
4.3.0: Send to Phone: move an exported clip to your phone over your own Wi-Fi — scan a QR, tap download. No cloud, no account, no quality loss.
Pin the companion page to your phone's home screen once, and skip the camera next time.
Turn it on/off anytime in Phone access settings; manage or revoke paired devices.
Exporting is now a single window: pick your settings, watch it render, then download or send to phone right there.
4.2.0: Try the editor instantly with a bundled sample clip and a 3-step tour on first launch.
Exports run in the background now — a corner progress pill, a queue, ETA + size, and a recent-exports list you can re-export from.
Save the look of a project as a reusable template, then start your next clip from it.
Press ⌘K for a command palette, or ? to see every keyboard shortcut.
New text & caption animations: typewriter, blur-in, wipe, and exit effects.
